mission.title: argo-events: Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus
mission.description: Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-events deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-events version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
helm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-events installation.

steps.title: Review argo-events configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events
```
We noticed that `EventBus`'s StatefulSet doesn't have readiness probes, although it has startup & liveness probes.

Add (or Allow adding) readiness probes to `EventBus` StatefulSet

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
No alternatives.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus
steps.description:
Adds `ReadinessProbe` to EventBus StatefulSets (JetStream and NATS Streaming) to fix GKE warnings and enable proper PodDisruptionBudget functionality.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add/Allow adding readiness probes to EventBus" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Adds `ReadinessProbe` to EventBus StatefulSets (JetStream and NATS Streaming) to fix GKE warnings and enable proper PodDisruptionBudget functionality.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible.
